title: The word of the month is ...
content:
"nano":http://www.apple.com/ipodnano/

!-/gallery/misc/ipod_nano.jpg!

... ;)

A related matter, I HATE *iTunes 5*!

!-/gallery/misc/itunes4.png!

!-/gallery/misc/itunes5.png!

I don't care about the "new phone":http://www.apple.com/itunes/mobile/. It's just a bar-type Motorola phone with iTunes syncing capability. Nothing interesting. %(me)IMHO, Motorola is synonymous to "flip-flop phone".% If you want a music phone, get the "SE W800i":http://www.sonyericsson.com/w800/mainpage.aspx.

Finally, previous G5 uptime before Software Update ..

!-/gallery/uptime/uptime_050908.png!

I think the longest used to be around 10 days or so.

Have a good day!

*[ addition ]*

Just arrived in the mail ...

!-/gallery/misc/piratesiliconvalley.jpg!

Wooo! Movie night tonight!
